COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-17-2018 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-17-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Nov-16-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, James Paul Green of the law offices of James Paul Green (415-664-9119) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Robert Schoen of the law offices of Legal Assistance to the Elderly, Inc. (415-538-3333) appears as counsel for defendants/moving parties

Both sides stipulate to judge pro tem. The cause is argued and submitted by both sides.

DEFENDANTS JOSH HOROWITZ and JENNIFER CHEN'S Motion To Compel is off calendar as moot. Monetary sanction in the amount of $500.00 imposed against Plaintiff, payable within ten (10) days of the filing of the written order. Written order is signed and filed.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul A. Renne; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: not reported (Disc302)
